page: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 32 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled running at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes 1890 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The AMD EPYC processor features a cache hierarchy of 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache, alongside advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, SHA_NI, and AES cryptography extensions.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core tests scoring in the top 10%. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. The system demonstrates strong capabilities in decompression tasks, image and text processing, and small-model LLM inference, where it achieves 2852.74 tokens/sec for prompt processing.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D32ads_v6 offers a balanced resource profile, combining dedicated compute, substantial memory, and large local storage without the premium cost of specialized memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware. This makes it highly suitable for general-purpose workloads, relational databases, web serving, software compilation, and moderate data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadv6 family, powered by a 3.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 server supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AES cryptography. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier single-core CPU capabilities and strong decompression, image processing, and small-model LLM inference speeds. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations remain average. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and integrated local storage, the D32ads_v6 provides a cost-effective, high-density resource profile. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, software compilation, and database workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v6 is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v6 is a general-purpose server with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, substantial local storage, and top-tier single-core performance.

128.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
1890 GB of local storage with premium storage capability
